prompt: Watercolour painting — an ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5). On one side, a tall plant covered in gaudy, showy blossoms but bearing no fruit; on the other, a small humble plant quietly heavy with ripe fruit. The contrast between empty show and true worth. Glowing against a dark ground. Loose luminous watercolour washes, soft wet-on-wet colour bleeds, granulation and visible paper grain, glowing against the dark ground. No text, no labels.
alt: A showy flowering plant with bright blossoms but no fruit, beside a small humble plant heavy with fruit
